title: Cemvita Signs Agreement With Government of Rio Grande do Sul to Deploy Industrial Plant in Southern Brazil
content: Cemvita, the U.S.-based industrial biotechnology company, signed an engagement agreement with Invest RS, formalizing its plan to build a facility in Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil, for the production of FermOilâ„¢. This sustainable oil will be used as feedstock for Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) production. The plant will also produce FermNPKâ„¢, an innovative biofertilizer that supports regenerative agriculture.
author: Analysts Account
